title: cockroach mod
description: Add terrifying cockroaches to your world.
body:
**This mod need Geckolib.**

This mod add a terrifying cockroach to your world.

The cockroach’s appearance is based on the American cockroach (Periplaneta americana) and is rendered in a realistic style. If you are afraid of cockroaches, please do not click on the images on this page.

The cockroach will spawn in the dark and will actively attack both players and animals, so please be cautious.
